publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Say 'Alexa, open its story time' then 'play a story'. Say 'Hindi' to switch language. Say 'list stories' to see all. Say 'play birbal' for a specific story.

en-IN.name: Its Story Time
en-IN.summary: Listen to beloved Indian folklore stories in English and Hindi with expressive narration.
en-IN.description: Its Story Time brings India's timeless folklore to life. Enjoy Panchatantra, Akbar-Birbal, Vikram-Betaal, Tenali Raman, Jataka Tales and more in English and Hindi. Each story features dramatic pauses, sound effects, and vivid storytelling. Perfect for bedtime, language learning, and family fun.

hi-IN.summary: Indian folklore in English and Hindi with expressive narration and sound effects.
